target_audience: A framework operator deciding whether an observed outcome miss remains visible in the next learning loop instead of disappearing after reporting.
expected_runtime_effect: The runtime-generated outcome failure should still be present in the learning loop snapshot.
The retained next value slice should explicitly reflect the rejected outcome claim.
The next-loop recommendation should be traceable back to the same failed outcome session.
remaining_gap: This runtime-generated case uses a rejection-driven miss rather than a metric-only miss.
Additional runtime-generated OC-004 families should cover fail-to-improve traces with explicit self-audit reinforcement.
